name: Sidebar
description: Collapsible app sidebar with groups, menu, and trigger.

api.name: Sidebar
api.description: Collapsible app sidebar with groups, menu, and trigger.

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Which edge the sidebar anchors to. Only Left and Right are supported; Top/Bottom fall through to the Left default.

examples.title: Push (Default)
examples.code: Acme Inc Platform Dashboard CN

examples.title: Overlay
examples.code:
Workspace Navigation Home
Click backdrop to dismiss.

examples.title: Side — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_sidebarSideSel" Options="_sidebarSideOptions" />
<SidebarProvider>
    <SidebarComponent Side="@_activeSide">
        <SidebarHeader>...</SidebarHeader>
        <SidebarContent>...</SidebarContent>
    </SidebarComponent>
    <main class="flex-1 p-6">
        <SidebarTrigger />
    </main>
</SidebarProvider>

@code {
    private string _sidebarSideSel = "Left";
    private Lumeo.Side _activeSide =>
        Enum.Parse<Lumeo.Side>(_sidebarSideSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _sidebarSideOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Left", Value = "Left" },
        new() { Label = "Right", Value = "Right" },
    };
}

examples.title: Icon
examples.code:
Home
Toggle to expand with labels.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Render the top divider. Default true. Set false for a seamless footer without a rule — replaces the consumer-side !border-t-0 override.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Render the bottom divider. Default true. Set false for a seamless header that flows into the content without a rule — replaces the consumer-side !border-b-0 override.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: LabelContent
parameters.description: Label slot. Named LabelContent to avoid shadowing the <Label> component.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Hint shown via the Lumeo <Tooltip> when the rail is collapsed (icon-only). Renders as a styled, accessible tooltip — not the native browser title — and stays hidden while the rail is expanded (the label is visible then).

parameters.name: MobileSheet
parameters.description: When true, the sidebar renders as an off-canvas sheet (slide-in over a dismissible scrim) on mobile viewports (< md), regardless of Variant. On larger viewports it keeps its configured variant. Collapsed acts as the sheet's closed state; toggling opens it. Opt-in (default false) so existing layouts are unchanged. (#241)

parameters.name: ToggleShortcut
parameters.description: Optional keyboard shortcut that toggles the sidebar, in the IKeyboardShortcutService combo format (e.g. "ctrl+b", "meta+b"). Registered on first render and released on dispose. Null disables the shortcut. (#241)

parameters.name: PersistCollapsed
parameters.description: When true, the collapsed / expanded state survives page reloads — the provider reads IsCollapsed from localStorage[PersistenceKey] on first render and writes back on every change. Falls back to the parameter value when JS is unavailable (SSR, prerender, JSDisconnectedException). Opt-in to keep existing consumers' behaviour untouched.

parameters.name: PersistenceKey
parameters.description: LocalStorage key used when PersistCollapsed is true. Override to scope a per-route or per-tenant sidebar so multiple sidebars on the same origin don't clobber each other's state.

enums.name: SidebarVariant
enums.description: Layout strategy for the sidebar. Push — collapses to zero width, pushing main content to the edge. Overlay — floats above content with a dismissible scrim. Icon — collapses to a narrow icon rail that stays put until toggled back. MiniRail — same icon-rail width when collapsed, but expands to full width on hover or keyboard focus and collapses again on leave. Material’s standard collapsed-sidebar pattern; uses Toggle() to pin open.

records.name: SidebarState
records.signature:
SidebarState(
        bool IsCollapsed,
        EventCallback Toggle,
        SidebarVariant Variant)

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

slots.name: LabelContent
slots.description: Label slot. Named LabelContent to avoid shadowing the <Label> component.

mdSummary:
# Sidebar

Collapsible app sidebar with groups, menu, and trigger.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sidebar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sidebar | State | `SidebarProvider.SidebarState?` | `` |  |
| Sidebar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Sidebar | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Left` | Which edge the sidebar anchors to. Only Left and Right are supported; Top/Bottom fall through to the Left default. |
| Sidebar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sidebar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarFooter | Bordered | `bool` | `true` | Render the top divider. Default true. Set false for a seamless footer without a rule — replaces the consumer-side !border-t-0 override. |
| SidebarFooter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroupLabel | State | `SidebarProvider.SidebarState?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroupLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroupLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarGroupLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarHeader | Bordered | `bool` | `true` | Render the bottom divider. Default true. Set false for a seamless header that flows into the content without a rule — replaces the consumer-side !border-b-0 override. |
| SidebarHeader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | State | `SidebarProvider.SidebarState?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| SidebarMenuButton | LabelContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Label slot. Named LabelContent to avoid shadowing the <Label> component. |
| SidebarMenuButton | Href | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | Tooltip | `string?` | `` | Hint shown via the Lumeo <Tooltip> when the rail is collapsed (icon-only). Renders as a styled, accessible tooltip — not the native browser title — and stays hidden while the rail is expanded (the label is visible then). |
| SidebarMenuButton | IsActive | `bool` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuButton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarProvider | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SidebarProvider | IsCollapsed | `bool` | `` |  |
| SidebarProvider | IsCollapsedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| SidebarProvider | Variant | `SidebarVariant` | `SidebarVariant.Push` |  |
| SidebarProvider | MobileSheet | `bool` | `` | When true, the sidebar renders as an off-canvas sheet (slide-in over a dismissible scrim) on mobile viewports (< md), regardless of Variant. On larger viewports it keeps its configured variant. Collapsed acts as the sheet's closed state; toggling opens it. Opt-in (default false) so existing layouts are unchanged. (#241) |
| SidebarProvider | ToggleShortcut | `string?` | `` | Optional keyboard shortcut that toggles the sidebar, in the IKeyboardShortcutService combo format (e.g. "ctrl+b", "meta+b"). Registered on first render and released on dispose. Null disables the shortcut. (#241) |
| SidebarProvider | PersistCollapsed | `bool` | `` | When true, the collapsed / expanded state survives page reloads — the provider reads IsCollapsed from localStorage[PersistenceKey] on first render and writes back on every change. Falls back to the parameter value when JS is unavailable (SSR, prerender, JSDisconnectedException). Opt-in to keep existing consumers' behaviour untouched. |
| SidebarProvider | PersistenceKey | `string` | `"lumeo.sidebar.collapsed"` | LocalStorage key used when PersistCollapsed is true. Override to scope a per-route or per-tenant sidebar so multiple sidebars on the same origin don't clobber each other's state. |
| SidebarProvider | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarProvider | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SidebarTrigger | State | `SidebarProvider.SidebarState` | `default!` |  |
| SidebarTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SidebarTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots

- `ChildContent` (SidebarContent) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (SidebarGroup) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (SidebarHeader) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SidebarMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SidebarMenuButton) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (SidebarMenuButton) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.
- `LabelContent` (SidebarMenuButton) — Label slot. Named LabelContent to avoid shadowing the <Label> component.
- `ChildContent` (SidebarMenuItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SidebarProvider) — RenderFragment slot

## Events

## Sub-components

## Cascading values it expects

## Services it injects

- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
